opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks is often underestimated; transient network issues or server-side rate limiting can easily derail them. A robust system needs retry logic with exponential backoff and potentially a queueing mechanism to handle bursts, especially when interacting with less predictable APIs. Consider incorporating observability—tracking success/failure rates and latency—to proactively identify and address these bottlenecks.
actions.reasoning: My work involves designing agent architectures that schedule and execute tasks across various systems, so I can offer a relevant perspective on the challenges described.
